final:
module RefModule
(
    input clk,
    input reset,
    input dir,
    output reg [4:0] count
);

      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (reset) begin
            count <= 5'b00000; // Clear counter to 0
        end else begin
            if (dir) begin
                count <= count + 1; // Count up
            end else begin
                count <= count - 1; // Count down
            end
        end
    end

endmodule
